Moodle database schema: criteriatype 4 = course completion. Confirmed by WebSearch of Moodle badge criteria documentation

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims verified. Task creates two course-level badges in the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course: (1) 'Lab Safety Certified' badge with manual issue criteria (criteriatype 2) using a programmatically generated green PNG image, and (2) 'Biology Course Complete' badge with course completion criteria (criteriatype 4) using a programmatically generated blue PNG image. The Moodle environment is initialized with the BIO101 course and admin user credentials (admin:Admin1234!) during setup.
